Alt_Part: (no direct functional equivalent — TPS2592 is a similar lower-feature alternative; LTC4231 with external FET is a controller+FET alternative)
Notes: Step-2 pivot iter 4 (DECISIONS §11): COMPLETE input-protection front-end. eFuse with programmable ILIM (R4 42.2kΩ → 2.08A) + programmable dV/dt soft-start (C7 100nF → T_RISE = V×C/I_dVdT = 5V×100nF/10µA = 50ms ramp, dV/dt = 100 V/s) + programmable UVLO (R7+R8 → trip 4.0V) + programmable OVP (R9+R10 → trip 6.04V) + thermal shutdown + FLT/PGOOD outputs + reverse-current blocking. Sai's reliability mandate (DECISIONS §10).

Step-2 pivot iter 4: reverse-polarity P-MOSFET upstream of U6 eFuse. Source=+5V_BEC_RAW (connector) Gate=GND Drain=+5V_BEC_PROT. Vgs=-5V (FET on) at normal polarity; Vgs=+5V (FET off) if BEC reversed → blocks reverse polarity. Rds(on)=50mΩ × 500mA = 25mV steady drop.

Step-2 pivot iter 4 (master config review 2026-05-21): TVS on +5V_BEC_PROT clamping fast (ns-scale) transients. V_WM=6.0V (>5.25V rail max → no normal-rail leakage). V_BR_min=6.67V > eFuse OVP trip 6.04V → OVP catches sustained over-voltage; TVS handles only fast events too quick for eFuse OVP. V_C=10.3V at peak surge.

Step-2 eFuse support 10kΩ instances: R8 = UVLO bottom divider (with R7=30.1kΩ top → trip 4.00V); R10 = OVP bottom divider (with R9=51kΩ top → trip 6.04V); R5 = FLT pull-up to +5V_BEC_PROT; R13 = PGOOD pull-up to +5V_BEC_PROT. (R4 is the 42.2kΩ ILIM resistor — separate row.)
Step-2 eFuse U6.17 ILIM resistor → I_LIMIT = 2.08A per TPS25940A datasheet table (R_ILIM=42.2kΩ → 2.08A typ). Bounds inrush + overcurrent BY CONSTRUCTION.
Step-2 eFuse U6.14 UVLO upper divider → trip at V_IN = 4.0V (board holds off below). R7+R8 = 30.1kΩ + 10kΩ; V_EN=0.99V at V_IN=4.0V per datasheet.

Step-2 eFuse U6.15 OVP upper divider (master config review 2026-05-21): trip at V_IN = 6.04V — gives 8% margin under AP2112K LDO V_IN abs-max 6.5V, and trips BEFORE TVS V_BR_min=6.67V so OVP is primary sustained-OV mechanism. Was 56kΩ → 6.5V (too close to abs-max).
Step-2 eFuse: C7=U6.18 dVdT (~15ms ramp); C8=U6 IN-pin bypass per datasheet.
Step-2 eFuse U6 OUT pin bypass per TPS25940A datasheet typical application.
